full_text:
Wen Yong 文雍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Yong (文雍). Given marquis title by his half-nephew Sun Xiu to carry on the Wang lineage. Wen Yong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
